user_defined_strat_20260402.name: Fee-First DLMM Strategy (2026-04-02)
user_defined_strat_20260402.author: User-defined

token_criteria.notes: No duplicate tokens, max 3 positions, fee_rate >= 2.0/hr, organic >= 76, volume >= $20k (30m)

entry.condition: Price >= -25% from ATH AND no 5%+ dump in 15m AND fee_rate >= 2.0/hr

exit.notes: Close if fee_rate < 1.5/hr OR OOR > 30m OR >6h open + low fee

user_defined_strat_20260402.raw:
# 🧠 CORE PRINCIPLES

* Profit comes from fees, not price speculation
* Small drawdowns are normal and acceptable
* Capital must always be actively deployed in high-yield pools
* Avoid unnecessary position churn

---

# 🚫 POSITION CONSTRAINTS (STRICT)

### NO DUPLICATE TOKEN

* Never open more than one position per token
* If token already exists in active positions → SKIP

### MAX POSITIONS

* Maximum active positions: 3
* If already 3 → DO NOT open new positions

### MIN CAPITAL

* Minimum 0.4 SOL per position
* If balance < 0.2 SOL → DO NOT open

---

# 📊 ENTRY STRATEGY 

Only open position if ALL conditions are met:

### PRICE CONDITION

* Price is at least -25% from ATH

### STABILITY FILTER

* No dump greater than 5% in last 15 minutes

### FEE FILTER

* Estimated fee_rate >= 2.0 per hour

### VOLATILITY-BASED RANGE

* Adjust range dynamically:

  * Low volatility → narrow range (±5%)
  * Medium volatility → moderate range (±10–15%)
  * High volatility → wide range (±15–25%)

---

# 💼 POSITION MANAGEMENT

### HOLD LOGIC (PRIORITY)

If ALL conditions are true:

* Price is inside range
* pnl_pct > -15%
* fee_rate is healthy

→ FORCE HOLD
→ Continue collecting fees
→ DO NOT CLOSE

---

### EXIT LOGIC (PRIMARY: FEE-BASED)

Close position if:

* fee_rate < 1.5 per hour

→ Close immediately
→ Even if pnl is small profit (+1% to +2%)
→ Redeploy capital

---

### OUT-OF-RANGE LOGIC

If:

* Price is outside range for more than 30 minutes

→ Close position
→ Redeploy capital

---

### TIME-BASED EXIT

If:

* Position open > 6 hours
  AND
* fee_rate below optimal

→ Close and redeploy

---

# 🛑 STOP LOSS (STRICT)

Trigger stop loss ONLY if:

* pnl_pct <= -10
  AND
* Price is OUTSIDE range

If still inside range:
→ NEVER trigger stop loss

---

# 🔄 AUTO REDEPLOY

After closing a position:

* Immediately scan market
* Select best available pool
* Reallocate capital efficiently

---

# 🧩 CAPITAL ALLOCATION

* High fee pool → allocate more capital (e.g. 0.3–0.4 SOL)
* Medium → 0.2–0.3 SOL
* Low → skip

Never fragment capital into small inefficient positions

---

# 🔍 PRE-OPEN VALIDATION (MANDATORY)

Before opening ANY position, verify:

1. Token not already active
2. Active positions < 3
3. Available SOL >= 0.2
4. Fee rate >= 2.0
5. Market is stable (no heavy dump)
6. Meets entry conditions

If ANY fail:
→ DO NOT OPEN

---

# 📈 PNL HANDLING (CRITICAL)

* pnl_pct is always in percentage format
  Example: -0.36 means -0.36%

* NEVER interpret -0.36 as -36%

* NEVER rescale or multiply incorrectly

---

# 🧾 LOGGING (MANDATORY)

Always log:

* token
* pnl_pct (raw and interpreted)
* fee_rate
* in_range (true/false)
* time_in_position
* reason for action (HOLD / CLOSE / SKIP)

---

# 🧠 BEHAVIOR SUMMARY

* Be patient
* Prioritize yield over fear
* Avoid overtrading
* Stay in high-volume pools
* Think long-term fee accumulation

---

# 🚀 EXECUTION PRIORITY

1. Safety checks
2. Fee quality
3. Range positioning
4. Capital efficiency
5. PnL (lowest priority)
